# TAI TCM Blog

TAI TCM Blog provides educational articles about Traditional Chinese Medicine, acupuncture, Tuina massage and Chinese herbal medicine.

Main website: https://www.taitcm.ch/
Blog: https://blog.taitcm.ch/
Sitemap: https://blog.taitcm.ch/sitemap.xml

Publisher: TAI TCM GmbH
Location: Schaffhauserstrasse 359, 8050 Zürich, Switzerland
Practitioner: Xinbo Tai
Professional focus: Traditional Chinese Medicine, acupuncture, Tuina, Chinese herbal therapy
Languages: German and English

## Main topics

- Acupuncture in Zurich
- Traditional Chinese Medicine
- Tuina massage
- Back pain and neck pain
- Migraine and headaches
- Allergies and hay fever
- Sleep disorders
- Digestive disorders
- Gynecological complaints
- Skin conditions
- Stress and burnout

- Rückenschmerzen: https://blog.taitcm.ch/de/rueckenschmerzen.html

- Heuschnupfen: https://blog.taitcm.ch/de/heuschnupfen.html
- Schlafstörung: https://blog.taitcm.ch/de/schlafstoerung.html
- Bronchitis und Asthma: https://blog.taitcm.ch/de/bronchitis.html
- Arthritis und Arthrose: https://blog.taitcm.ch/de/arthritis.html
